name: Lemon Kiss Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the butter, sugar, and lemon extract until light and fluffy.
2. Add flour and almonds; beat at low speed until well blended.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour for easier handling.
4. Shape scant tablespoon of dough around each candy kiss, covering completely.
5. Roll in hands to form a ball. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for 8-12 minutes or until set and bottom edges are light golden brown.
7. Cool cookies for 1 minute before removing from the cookie sheets.
8. Cool completely.
9. Lightly sprinkle cooled cookies with powdered sugar.
10. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate chips and shortening, stirring until smooth.
11. Drizzle over each cookie.
High Altitude: Above 3500 feet: Decrease butter to 1-1/4 cups. Bake as directed above.
